div.p: BIOS-reported memory regions for frame allocator initialization

[0] 0x00000000 - 0x0009FFFF: Usable (640KB) [1] 0x000A0000 - 0x000BFFFF: Reserved (VGA) [2] 0x000C0000 - 0x000FFFFF: Reserved (BIOS) [3] 0x00100000 - 0x1FFFFFFF: Usable (511MB) [4] 0x20000000 - 0x20000FFF: ACPI Reclaimable [5] 0x20001000 - 0x20001FFF: ACPI NVS
